news.t: 9 Best Biotech ETFs to Play High-Octane Trends

holdings.infoBox: IDNA is an equity ETF with a total of 68 individual holdings. The top holdings are Revolution Medicines stock at 7.50%, Moderna at 7.02%, Twist Bioscience at 5.15%, Ipsen at 4.76%, and Exelixis at 4.46%.

overview.description: The iShares Genomics Immunology and Healthcare ETF (IDNA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks a market-cap-selected and -weighted index of global stocks involved in genomics, immunology, and bioengineering. IDNA was launched on Jun 11, 2019 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: NYSE FactSet Global Genomics and Immuno Biopharma Index

data.title: 9 Best Biotech ETFs to Play High-Octane Trends
data.text: Biotechnology is a dynamic but often volatile industry. These biotech ETFs provide a lower-risk way to invest in the space.

data.title: Best Biotech ETFs for Q2 2021
data.text: The best biotech ETFs for Q2 2021 are ARKG, IDNA, and XBI.

data.title: ETF Edge: Big boost for energy ETF
data.text: CNBC's Bob Pisani breaks down the biggest exchange-traded funds moves.
